narrative:
Blendon-D (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,416 registered voters, with 56.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.4%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.2 percentage points.
